raiL_OPTIONS.pricE_TYPE_TEXT:
BQuick

Advance Purchase Discounted fare

All changes or cancellations must be made prior to the scheduled departure time of the service.

 

Travel Class Economy Seats. Change Fees $15 per person. Cancellation Fees $25 per person one way.

 

Travel Class Business Seats, RailBeds, Twin and Single Sleepers. Change Fees $15 per person. Cancellation Fees $50 per person one way.

 

More information is available at Fare Types

BQuick

Advance Purchase Discounted fare

All changes or cancellations must be made prior to the scheduled departure time of the service.

 

Travel Class Economy Seats. Change Fees $15 per person. Cancellation Fees $25 per person one way.

 

Travel Class Business Seats, RailBeds, Twin and Single Sleepers. Change Fees $15 per person. Cancellation Fees $50 per person one way.

 

More information is available at Fare Types

raiL_OPTIONS.servicE_OPTION_NAME: Accessible Seat (+ accessible space + carers seat)
raiL_OPTIONS.pricE_TYPE_TEXT:
BQuick

Advance Purchase Discounted fare

All changes or cancellations must be made prior to the scheduled departure time of the service.

 

Travel Class Economy Seats. Change Fees $15 per person. Cancellation Fees $25 per person one way.

 

Travel Class Business Seats, RailBeds, Twin and Single Sleepers. Change Fees $15 per person. Cancellation Fees $50 per person one way.

 

More information is available at Fare Types
raiL_OPTIONS.servicE_OPTION_DESCRIPTION:
These seats are for customers with a disability and include space for a mobility device and a carers seat.
We may contact you to discuss your requirements or carer eligibility for free travel.
To learn more, go to the Accessibility Information link.

raiL_OPTIONS.pricE_TYPE_TEXT:
BQuick

Advance Purchase Discounted fare

All changes or cancellations must be made prior to the scheduled departure time of the service.

 

Travel Class Economy Seats. Change Fees $15 per person. Cancellation Fees $25 per person one way.

 

Travel Class Business Seats, RailBeds, Twin and Single Sleepers. Change Fees $15 per person. Cancellation Fees $50 per person one way.

 

More information is available at Fare Types
raiL_OPTIONS.servicE_OPTION_DESCRIPTION:
These seats are for customers that are travelling with an assistance animal.
We may contact you to discuss your requirements or to confirm what type of assistance animal pass you hold and discuss handler responsibilities.
To learn more, please select the Accessibility Information link on this page.

raiL_OPTIONS.servicE_OPTION_DESCRIPTION: 20kg maximum applies. One (1) bicycle per customer. Accepted in a bicycle box or bag. If not in a bag/box - need handle bars turned parallel to frame and pedals removed. Bring your own tools and allow time for disassembling. Other conditions apply, go to our Luggage webpage and then Sporting Equipment and Musical Instruments for information.

raiL_OPTIONS.pricE_TYPE_TEXT:

More information is available at Fare Types
raiL_OPTIONS.servicE_OPTION_DESCRIPTION:
Surfboards, snowboards or water skis in a protective cover up to a maximum length of 200cm. 20kg maximum applies. Only one (1) item per customer.
Conditions apply, go to our Luggage webpage and then go to Sporting Equipment and Musical Instruments for information.
